exercises.title: Stage Capability Analyzer
exercises.description: Build a tool to analyze capabilities at each network stage.
hints: Consider both hardware and protocol requirements

exercises.title: Application-Stage Mapper
exercises.description: Map applications to their minimum required network stages.
tasks: Define set of quantum internet applications
Find stage with most new applications
hints: Some apps have hard stage requirements
Consider what primitives each app needs
Group applications by stage for clarity

exercises.title: Transition Requirements Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate technology requirements for stage transitions.
tasks: Set threshold requirements for each transition
hints: Some metrics are more challenging than others

exercises.title: Network Stage Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate network behavior at different stages.
tasks: Model network nodes with stage-appropriate capabilities
hints: Track metrics like rate, fidelity, security
Show how higher stages improve metrics
